# Bows
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Bows&prop=wikitext

'''Bows''' are used by [[Archer]]s and [[Huntress]]es.
==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this [https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/bows link].'''''

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Hallow's End|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Metal Blood Bow|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Bow of the Lightning God|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Greeni|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Hornshot|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Ice Shatter|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Wooden Elegance|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Undead's Gross Bow|l}}
|-
| {{ItemDisplay|Handcannon|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Reaper's Bow|p}}
|}
===Starforce {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Galaxy Longbow|g}}
|}
